title: What makes a healthy token raise
author: Cryptool
excerpt_html: Vesting, distribution, and transparent pool terms separate sustainable raises from the rest. A short field guide.
content_html:
Not all raises are created equal. The mechanics around vesting and distribution often decide whether a project survives its first year.

Vesting and distribution

Clear, enforceable vesting schedules align contributors and the team. Cryptool's Raise module handles pool creation, vesting, and distribution end-to-end.

Transparency

Published pool terms and on-chain tracking build the trust a raise needs to succeed.
